## Dubai, October 13-17, 2025

The countdown has begun for one of the world's most influential technology events, GITEX GLOBAL 2025, and Mangobot is ready to redefine what's possible in robotics.

At this year's exhibition, Mangobot will unveil the next generation of intelligent humanoid machines, designed to bridge the gap between artificial intelligence and human interaction. Our innovations go beyond automation - they represent a leap toward adaptability, emotional intelligence, and real-world functionality.


## A Glimpse Into the Future

Visitors can expect to witness humanoid robots capable of intuitive movement, expressive communication, and advanced self-learning capabilities. These breakthroughs mark a major step toward truly autonomous, human-compatible machines that can assist in homes, workplaces, and public environments alike.

Whether you are a technology visionary, investor, or robotics enthusiast, Mangobot's showcase at GITEX offers a front-row seat to the evolution of humanoid technology.

## Event Details

Location: Hall 6, Concourse CC2-6  
Dates: October 13-17, 2025  
Venue: Dubai World Trade Center

## Event Details

Experience the future, live. Discover how Mangobot is shaping a world where humans and robots thrive together.  
Stay tuned to our channels for exclusive previews, behind-the-scenes insights, and real-time coverage from GITEX GLOBAL 2025.
